arts.ttl: What to expect from 'underwhelming' Middlesbrough and Michael Carrick ahead of Bristol City trip
arts.sum: In that sense, having two quickfire games away from home could be ideally timed for Carrick and Boro, with many supporters growing frustrated with the same old problems afflicting their side and the potential for the Riverside to turn quite toxic if things don’t improve. Yet, to Conway’s credit, but for two hamstring injuries, he’s pushed Latte Lath hard for a place in the team throughout the season, and at times even kept him out.

arts.ttl: Delano Burgzorg Middlesbrough importance admission made after harsh selection call
arts.sum: After the Watford game, Carrick explained that the decision was a tactical one as he pushed Hayden Hackney into Burgzorg’s roaming wide role and started Dan Barlaser alongside Aidan Morris in an attempt to make the Boro side more defensively compact. Michael Carrick admitted Delano Burgzorg is now an important Middlesbrough player while playing down the decision to drop the forward in last weekend’s defeat to Watford.

arts.ttl: Potential Boro line-up for Bristol City after injury update from Michael Carrick
arts.sum: Giles was dropped for the Watford game as Carrick looked to solidify, but with the more mobile Dijksteel at right-back, Giles could add more attacking prowess to the Boro side. In terms of an injury update ahead of the game, Carrick said Fry would return after missing last weekend’s Watford defeat through illness.

arts.ttl: Former Bristol City midfielder joins Premier League club's first-team coaching staff
arts.sum: Leicester City have confirmed that former Bristol City midfielder and Wales international Andy King has joined the Foxes' first-team coaching staff. In the summer, the 36-year-old linked up with Leicester City's under-18s to assist head coach Adam Barradell and after just a matter of months with the youth side, the Foxes have confirmed that King has now taken on a role within Ruud van Nistelrooy's set-up.

arts.ttl: The buzzword Michael Carrick used eight times in his bullish Middlesbrough press conference
arts.sum: Instead, Boro are battling for a top-six spot and are, despite form, only four points off the play-offs and have a game in hand, which comes on Tuesday night at Stoke City. Get wins at Bristol City and Stoke City and suddenly that perspective looks entirely different for Boro heading into the final 12 games.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning makes Elijah Morrison 'patience' point ahead of Bristol City vs Middlesbrough
arts.sum: Liam Manning has admitted Elijah Morrison will have to be patient for his first-team opportunity at Bristol City but insists the young defender is making visible progress on the training ground. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's response to Middlesbrough coaching team 'experience' theory
arts.sum: Michael Carrick dismissed the theory that he could be helped by having a more experienced coach on his backroom team, insisting he is happy with the dynamics of his current Middlesbrough team. While Graeme has around 15 years worth of coaching experience at the FA and Newcastle United, while Carrick and Woodgate have various experiences in their young coaching careers too, it’s often heard from some supporters that an older head with greater experience could really help the Boro head coach.
